title: minuartia tenuifolia subsp. conferta
intro: Minuartia tenuifolia subsp. conferta, also known as dwarf sweet- Alison or Alpine sweet Alison, is a perennial flowering plant that belongs to the carnation family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can be attributed to its high content of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Minuartia tenuifolia subsp. conferta include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and act as a natural remedy for digestive problems. The plant can be prepared for herbal use through infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
